name: Tri-County Bank
description_short: Tri-County Bank is a community bank offering checking, savings, mortgages, consumer loans, and business financing with a focus on agriculture and local customers.
description_long: Tri-County Bank positions itself as a hometown community bank with deep roots in agricultural lending and local relationship banking. The bank emphasizes personalized service, stating "You're not just another customer" and "We're not just another bank," positioning itself against larger institutional competitors. Their marketing highlights multi-generational trust and community focus, using the tagline "the Bank where you Live." Tri-County Bank offers a comprehensive range of consumer and business banking services. On the consumer side, they provide online banking, mobile card management through MyCardRules™, checking and savings accounts, ATM/debit card services, mortgage lending, and consumer loans including auto loans and personal loans. For business customers, they offer business loans and financing to support business goals. Their mortgage lending division operates a dedicated phone line (1-800-346-9909) for rate quotes and applications. The bank distinguishes itself through specialization in agricultural lending ("We Know Agriculture") and emphasis on local decision-making. They offer MyCardRules™, a mobile card management tool allowing customers to control spending directly from their phones. The bank also provides a "Hometown Secure Rewards" program and maintains active social media presence (Facebook noted), suggesting community engagement beyond traditional banking. As a traditional community bank, Tri-County Bank serves customers seeking personalized service and local relationship banking. However, the website provides limited information about specific interest rates, fees, or loan terms. No details appear regarding minimum balances, APRs, or competitive advantages beyond relationship banking and agricultural expertise. The company operates a standard regional bank model without apparent digital-first or specialized lending innovation.
services: Online banking and mobile banking platform
Debit/ATM cards with MyCardRules™ mobile controls
Consumer auto loans and personal loans
Lost or stolen card replacement service
pros: Specializes in agricultural lending with demonstrated expertise in farming and agricultural customers
MyCardRules™ mobile card management tool allows real-time spending controls from smartphone
Multi-generational trust positioning suggests long-standing community presence and stability
Full-service banking including mortgages, consumer loans, business loans, and deposit accounts
Dedicated mortgage lending line (1-800-346-9909) for personalized rate quotes
Hometown Secure Rewards program for depositors and cardholders
24/7 lost/stolen card support (1-888-297-3416) for cardholder protection
cons: Website lacks specific information about interest rates, APRs, or loan terms for comparison
No mention of CD rates, savings account APY, or checking account features and benefits
Limited digital/online product information; appears to rely on phone calls for rate quotes and applications
No transparent fee schedule available on website for overdrafts, monthly maintenance, or loan origination
Geographic coverage unclear; no branch locator or service area definition provided
best_for: Agricultural customers and farmers seeking specialized lending and community-based service
Multi-generational families prioritizing relationship banking and local decision-making
Small business owners needing business loans and personalized commercial lending
Consumers wanting mobile card controls and real-time spending management tools
diagnosis: Tri-County Bank is best for community-focused customers, particularly those in agriculture or small business, who value relationship banking and local service. The main caveat is the lack of transparent pricing and rate information online; customers must call to compare products against national competitors.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
